task_completion.description: FreeCAD is opened and a new document is created
task_completion.visual_evidence: The FreeCAD application window is visible with a new active workspace/document.

task_completion.description: A base cylindrical shaft is created using the Pad feature
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 3D cylinder is visible in the viewport. The Tree View panel on the left should display a 'Pad' feature.

task_completion.description: The base cylinder has the correct 20mm diameter and 60mm length
task_completion.visual_evidence: The cylinder's aspect ratio in the viewport should be 1:3 (width to length). Exact dimensions (radius 10mm, length 60mm) may be visible in the property editor, task panel, or sketch constraints.

task_completion.description: An O-ring groove is created using the Groove tool
task_completion.visual_evidence: A circumferential cut (indentation) is visible around the cylinder. The Tree View panel should display a 'Groove' feature.

task_completion.description: The groove is located correctly at Z=15 with appropriate width and depth
task_completion.visual_evidence: The groove is located roughly 1/4 of the way up from the bottom face of the cylinder. It should appear narrow (2.5mm wide) and shallow (1.5mm deep) relative to the 60mm long shaft.

task_completion.description: The document is saved to the specified path
task_completion.visual_evidence: The FreeCAD window title bar displays 'shaft_with_groove.FCStd' or a save dialog shows the file being saved to '/home/ga/Documents/FreeCAD/'.

integrity.description: The agent used the FreeCAD GUI to model the part
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent clicking on FreeCAD toolbars, interacting with sketches, and using the Tree View, rather than just executing a Python script in a terminal.

integrity.description: The 3D model is genuinely rendered in the FreeCAD viewport
integrity.visual_evidence: The viewport displays a proper 3D object with standard FreeCAD shading, grid, and axis cross, not an imported 2D image.

integrity.description: The file was saved via the application interface
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'Save' or 'Save As' dialog is used, or the main window title updates naturally, rather than the file being created via terminal commands like 'touch'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target file: /home/ga/Documents/FreeCAD/shaft_with_groove.FCStd. Expected volume: 18631.61 mm³ (±5%). Bounding box dimensions: 20.0 x 20.0 x 60.0 mm. Required features in Tree View: 'Pad' (for the base cylinder) and 'Groove' (for the O-ring cut). Groove center Z-location: 15.0 mm.
